problem id: adeac6af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(2)) XOR ROT(2)

examples:
  11100111 -> 00010011
  10110110 -> 10010010
  01011010 -> 01001001
  10110101 -> 10010110
  11100011 -> 00001011
  10011001 -> 01000110
  10011000 -> 01000010
  01001010 -> 00101001

query: 10100101
predicted answer: 10010110
